articles.title: British Prime Minister Starmer pledges to prove his doubters wrong but faces a wave of resignation calls
articles.description:
Last week’s elections saw Labour squeezed from both right and left, losing votes to both Reform UK and the “eco-populist” Green Party.

The post British Prime Minister Starmer pledges to prove his doubters wrong but faces a wave of resignation calls appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Labour Party lost significant votes in recent elections, impacting local political dynamics.
Prime Minister Starmer faces resignation calls after disappointing results on May 11, 2026.
Boston residents may see shifts in local policies due to Labour's weakened position.

articles.title: These are Boston’s highest-paid tech CEOs, BBJ data shows
articles.description:
In 2025, no Boston tech CEO came close to Wayfair’s leader in total compensation, according to the Boston Business Journal report.

The post These are Boston’s highest-paid tech CEOs, BBJ data shows appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Wayfair CEO topped Boston tech compensation in 2025, surpassing all peers significantly.
Boston Business Journal reported no other tech CEO matched Wayfair's leader's earnings.
High CEO salaries may influence local job market and tech industry dynamics.
